sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74810" key="o)reidromi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρει-δρομία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n74810.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">running on the hills,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.413</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
